The '''Firestorm 2 engine''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] engine produced by [[MandalMotors/Legends|MandalMotors]] at the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
